title: derris pseudinvoluta
intro: Derris pseudinvoluta, also known as the Chinese Derris or Derris, is a plant species belonging to the family Leguminosae, native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Derris pseudinvoluta include its potential use in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In terms of herbal preparations, Derris pseudinvoluta is often used in combination with other herbs to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
